jobTitle: Video Editor & Graphic Designer & Media Buyer
desc: Designed creative and engaging promotional posts and materials. Edited high-quality videos using DaVinci Resolve and Adobe Premiere Pro.Managed paid advertising campaigns on Facebook & Instagram and analyzed performance to improve reach and engagement.

jobTitle: Video Editor & Graphic Designer & Media Buyer
desc: Produced professional graphic and video content. Managed and optimized social media campaigns to achieve best results.

Developed promotional and visual materials for marketing campaigns. Created complete visual identities for clients, ensuring brand consistency. Collaborated with the marketing team to achieve campaign objectives.
